---
title: 'Character Bible'
date: '2023-12-25T06:12:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4280542133149987495'
blogger_filename: '/p/character-bible_24.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
A place to keep characters as they develop... Stand by for continuous tweaking...</h3>
<br />
<br />
<b>White Noise Character Bible:</b><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/colonel-theron-ash-ashland-usaf-spec-ops.html" target="_blank">Colonel Theron "Ash" Ashland, USAF Spec Ops.</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2016/10/grace-scriven-reporter.html" target="_blank">Grace Scriven - Reporter</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/chester-jandihar-white-hat-hacker.html" target="_blank">Chester Jandihar - White Hat Hacker</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2016/10/jazmin-hackerorphan-getting-into.html" target="_blank">Jazmin Doe - Hacker/Orphan</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/dr-richard-t-briar-phdborn-niklaus-von.html" target="_blank">Dr. Richard T. Briar PhD</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/thaddeus-j-b-rotcudnoc.html" target="_blank">Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/technical-sergeant-tsgt-nadine-etaine.html" target="_blank">Technical Sergeant (TSgt) Nadine Etaine (Eta) Romanakov, USAF</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/general-akbar.html" target="_blank">General Akbar</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/walter-elias-vanderbilt-darkmater.html" target="_blank">Walter Elias Vanderbilt / Darkmater (Moriarty)</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/2015/12/waqas-ahmed-combatant-soldier.html" target="_blank">Waqas Ahmed (Combatant Soldier)</a>
<br />
<br />
<br />
